core_mechanism: likelihood-based statistical model selection among competing generative stochastic-process hypotheses fitted to a single observed trajectory, with discriminability predicted by large-system (thermodynamic-limit) asymptotics that sharpen near a critical threshold
brief_reason: The abstract frames the task as inferring which of six competing spreading mechanisms generated observed dynamics via model selection, and shows that thermodynamic-limit approximations predict when the mechanisms become distinguishable, with detectability peaking near phase transitions.
